parts.text:

After successful POST, get project id from response.
Redirect to /admin/manage/{id}.

parts.text:
Actually, looking at the output, the code now looks correct. The file looks good now. The changes have been made properly:
1. Added `useNavigate` import from react-router-dom
2. Created `navigate` using useNavigate hook
3. After successful POST, get project id from response (data.id)
4. Redirect to `/admin/manage/${data.id}`

The implementation is simple and follows what the user requested.
